query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN status='pending' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as pending, SUM(CASE WHEN status='contacted' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as contacted, SUM(CASE WHEN status='scheduled' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as scheduled, SUM(CASE WHEN status='completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as completed FROM giveawayApplications WHERE isTestEntry=0;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2R3ugynrRDzjYQU.e9d0c4c091a8 --database A5GjFitCrpqWQ2wnoTJiWm --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN status='pending' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as pending, SUM(CASE WHEN status='contacted' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as contacted, SUM(CASE WHEN status='scheduled' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as scheduled, SUM(CASE WHEN status='completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as completed FROM giveawayApplications WHERE isTestEntry=0;
